summary: Tested responsive design across all pages at mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px) viewports. Also tested AI generate-goals endpoint returning both goals[] and budgets[] arrays. Backend: 7/8 tests pass (100% for feature tests). Frontend: All pages render correctly at mobile with proper stacking, wrapping, and no major overflow issues.

issues: Content area is ~944px wide with ~720px right margin. This is intentional design for readability but could be expanded for users who prefer wider layouts.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals returns 401 without auth
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals without insights returns appropriate response
Backend: POST /api/ai/generate-goals returns BOTH 'goals' AND 'budgets' arrays
Backend: POST /api/budgets returns 401 without auth
Backend: POST /api/budgets with category field creates budget successfully
Backend: GET /api/budgets returns list of budgets
Backend: Login works with demo credentials
Frontend: Dashboard at mobile (375px) - KPI cards stack, charts stack, buttons wrap, no horizontal overflow
Frontend: Transactions at mobile - stats stack, search full-width, filter full-width, items wrap properly
Frontend: Invoices at mobile - stats cards stack, filter full-width, invoice items wrap properly
Frontend: Tax Calculator at mobile - form stacks vertically, no horizontal overflow
Frontend: Settings at mobile - form fields stack, notification toggles visible
Frontend: Admin at mobile - stats cards stack, user list items wrap properly
Frontend: Goal Tracker at mobile - stats stack, goal cards fill width
Frontend: Reports at mobile - stats stack, charts stack
Frontend: Suppliers at mobile - search full-width, cards stack
Frontend: Recurring at mobile - buttons wrap, items wrap properly
Frontend: Export at mobile - filter fields stack, export cards stack
Frontend: Insights at mobile - Generate Insights button visible, Create Goals & Budgets button visible
Frontend: Dashboard at desktop (1920px) - KPI cards in row, charts side by side, sidebar visible
Frontend: Transactions at desktop - stats in row, search and filter side by side
critical_code_review_comments: Responsive design implementation is solid with proper use of sm:, md:, lg: breakpoints
flex-col sm:flex-row pattern used correctly for mobile wrapping
w-full sm:w-[180px] pattern used for select elements
grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 used for stats cards

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 feature tests pass, 1 health check returns 401 which is expected)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Responsive design testing complete. All pages tested at mobile (375px) and desktop (1920px) viewports. Key responsive patterns: 1) flex-col sm:flex-row for mobile wrapping, 2) w-full sm:w-[180px] for selects, 3) grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 for stats. AI generate-goals endpoint returns both goals[] and budgets[] arrays. POST /api/budgets accepts category field which maps to 'name' in DB.
